scientific_scope: diagnosis only; no training, test inference, model selection, or final673 access

error_definitions.oracle: per-record minimum absolute error; diagnostic upper bound only

subgroup_policy.underpowered_action: report estimates but forbid directional decision claims
subgroup_policy.similarity_underpowered_merge: merge adjacent bins from low to high until both minima are met; merge a final underpowered remainder into its previous bin
subgroup_policy.target_bins: quartiles computed once from the already-frozen test truth

learning_dynamics_rules.underfit: best epoch >= 90% of maximum and final-five validation slope is negative
learning_dynamics_rules.overfit: post-best train loss decreases >=5% while final validation MAE is >=2% above best
learning_dynamics_rules.unstable: seed CV of best validation MAE >5% or within-run last-ten validation SD >0.01 eV

all_372: geometry RMSD versus primary target range
same versus different role-aware identity strata
frozen_val_test_only: geometry RMSD versus M3 prediction range

validation_counterfactuals.edge_policy: keep frozen edge indices to isolate distance-channel response
validation_counterfactuals.global_transform: fixed orthonormal rotation and translation [1.25,-0.75,0.50] angstrom
validation_counterfactuals.DA_separation: move donor and acceptor centroids apart symmetrically along their centroid axis; unknown atoms unchanged; empty roles skipped

decision_matrix.SCALE_3D: stable geometry signal plus both architectures satisfy underfit rule plus physically ordered counterfactual response
decision_matrix.FUSE_2D_3D: at least two preregistered adequately powered subgroups show 3D-minus-XGBoost group-bootstrap CI below zero and oracle group-macro gain >=0.005 eV
decision_matrix.STOP_PURE_3D: neither prior condition holds, or geometry-label association is weak while role perturbation median is comparable to model MAE

forbidden: new test inference or test counterfactual
test-driven subgroup addition or bin edits
calling graph-supported role candidates ground truth
